Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans Ti Post Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Jun-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $336.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-02-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
